headline: US rig count down three as prices fall
summary: The rig count in the Permian Basin was unchanged this week, the latest count Friday by Baker Hughes shows, with 242 rigs active in the region. A year ago, 289 rigs were active in the region. Nationally, the oil and gas rig count is down three from last week at 545 rigs. A year ago, 583 rigs were active. The count shows that 411 rigs sought oil, unchanged from the previous week, and 127 ...
